## Verification


- [ ] Added or updated tests for behavior changes

## Contract / Safety

- [ ] No canonical contract changes
- [ ] Contract changes included and documented
- [ ] Contract changes require human approval
- [ ] No policy, approval, or security weakening
- [ ] No new external credential requirement for the default demo

## Review

- [ ] Not required: docs-only or planning-only
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Additional maintainer review completed, if requested
- [ ] QA review required
- [ ] Security review required
- [ ] Architecture review required

- Known risks:
- Deferred items:

## Open-Source Hygiene

- [ ] No secrets or credentials
- [ ] No private customer data
- [ ] No internal communications, session notes, model conversations, or private strategy drafts
- [ ] No copied closed-source content
- [ ] No copied third-party implementation code
